visual_description: A man in a white shirt stands on a balcony at night, gripping the railing and looking toward a man in a dark suit who is partially hidden behind a sheer curtain at a doorway. The scene is dimly lit with city lights visible in the background and a bright light shining on the wall behind the curtain. The man in the suit appears to be standing in the doorway.
audio_description: Ambient night sounds are faint, with no clear speech or distinct noises.
